transcript.text:
[Pork Belly]
Hello everyone
I'm at Imun-dong today
I've been craving pork belly lately
And found one nearby
I'm here
[Soht Tukung Samgyupsal Jip] [Dongdaemun-gu, Seoul]
The menu is over there
There are 4 different types of meat
Let's go with pork since that's why I'm here
How many servings?
About 3kgs, no?
Excuse me, 7 servings of pork belly,
3 servings of shoulder, and 5 servings of pork jowl, please
7+3+5...?
I really love this grill for KBBQ

It tastes different
I've tried all different kinds of grills before
I want to eat already
[Pork belly]
[Shoulder]
[Pork Jowl]
Everything is out
Looks delicious The cuts are thick
Compared to my finger
Why so much meat there?
Aren't you on TV?
Yes, I've been on TV
You're eating all of that?
Eat up
Thank you
Is it hot?

Not yet
It needs to make a sound
That smell is no joke
It smells so good
My stomach was hurting
But not anymore after seeing this
[Some kimchi too]
Bean sprouts
It sounds like it's raining
[She searched her up on YouTube]
-Did you see it? -I'll get the views up
Thank you Over here is fine
Bon appetit
Looks great
Dip it
So good The fat

It has a great consistency
Savory too
With ssamjang (soybean seasoning paste)
Pork belly for dinner, everyone
3 pieces
With ssamjang
(She's not the owner btw) It's really good!
Keep eating I'll be there getting the views up
Yay! More views
Perilla leaf
Wrap it
That's so good
Sweet & sour Very tasty
Need to try it with kimchi
Crazy
Pork belly is popular outside of Korea too

Korean... What was it?
With bean sprouts this time
Pork belly and kimchi
Pork jowl next
Perilla leaf goes so well
Even better than with kimchi
This deserves a best couples award
Kimchi and pork belly
Let's try the pork jowl now
With some salt
Great consistency
With radish This is here to clean the grill
So good
Steamed egg
Very sott
Shoulder meat

Some pork jowl while we wait
So big Can I eat it?
Against the grain
I used to like fat a lot so I didn't like shoulder meat
But I've been liking them now
Let's bring them in
With some salt
Tasty
Chewy and soft
The fat tastes really great
Also has a great consistency
The texture is insane
With kimchi
Their portions are pretty big
Perilla leaf
I burned the roof of my mouth

Completely gone It hurts
Mushrooms I forgot about them
Salt
So juicy
Get all of them
Pork belly
I came to work earlier just to see you
She was like "Would you like to come now?"
"On my way!"
Lettuce wrap is the way to go
It's really good
But the roof of my mouth hurts
Pork belly
I came back to it
I love this grill because when the fire is low It just keeps the food warm
And when on high heat, it cooks very fast

A big bite
Some burnt meat inside the stew
The grease will make it better
So good
The grease did add flavor to it
-You ate a lot already -It takes time to cook
Get 20 servings next time
I just met up with a friend right now
"Is someone eating something over there?"
"Tzuyang is here eating pork belly"
And she said, "Oh, that person that eats alot"
[Fan from China]
I ate 1.2kg back in my prime
Thank you
[Thank you for the plum juice gift]
Let's get them back on the grill

My mouth hurts so much
Altogether now
Looks like a face
1 by 1 for the sake of my mouth
I really want to get fried rice
But there are a lot of people waiting
So I will have to go after this
Pork jowl
Cooked this as a whole
Even more juicy like this
Such a bummer I won't get fried rice
Thank you
I heard their fried rice is amazing Looks good too
Please let me know how it is
Last one
[6 cans of sodas and 2 bottles of plum juice...]

I watched her eat before and she eats a lot
She is beyond incredible
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Anthony Hyun Choi] [antchoi91@gmail.com]
